column1: 注:本表2005年以来数据均依据能源平衡表，能源生产、消费增速分别采用当量值和等价值，电力生产量包括一次电力和火电，电力消费
a) The data of the table prior to 2005 are calculated according to Overall Energy Balance Sheet.Growth rate of energy production adopt heat equivalent
value, and that of energy consumption adopt heat value equivalent.The production of electricity include primary electricity and thermal power.The
consumption of electricity refers to the whole provincial consumption.
